LanguageData.BMS_Settings_LabelBaseUrl: LLM Base URL (for OpenAI-compatible APIs, keep up to /chat/completions):
LanguageData.BMS_Settings_EnableAISorting: Enable AI-assisted sorting (Experimental, replaces vanilla auto-sort)
LanguageData.BMS_Settings_EnableAISortingDesc: When enabled, clicking "Auto-sort" will call an LLM to generate soft constraints, then use vanilla topological sort. When disabled, vanilla sorting is used.
LanguageData.BMS_Settings_LabelErrorLogMaxChars: Max error log chars sent to AI
LanguageData.BMS_Settings_LabelShortDescMaxChars: Max raw description chars for summary extraction
LanguageData.BMS_Settings_EnableDebugDump: Enable Debug Dump (write LLM key info to files)
LanguageData.BMS_Settings_EnableDebugDumpDesc: When enabled, a summary of each LLM call (model, token usage, response content) will be written to files in the Dump subdirectory.
LanguageData.BMS_AILoading_AnalyzingDesc: Analyzing and extracting short summary for {0}...
LanguageData.BMS_AILoading_Timeout: Request timed out or was canceled. Please check your network and API URL config.
LanguageData.BMS_AILoading_FaultedStatus: Request threw an exception. Press ~ to view the red error in console.
LanguageData.BMS_AILoading_ParseFailed: Failed to parse AI response. Press ~ to view console for details.
LanguageData.BMS_AILoading_Waiting: Please wait, the AI is thinking
LanguageData.BMS_LLM_ApiKeyMissing: API Key not configured! Please enter your LLM API Key in the mod settings.
LanguageData.BMS_Error_BackupFailed: Failed to back up previous error file
LanguageData.BMS_Patch_DuplicateFound: {0} MODs found using the same PackageId:
LanguageData.BMS_Patch_DuplicateAdvice: Suggestion: Remove the duplicate MODs, keep only one version.
LanguageData.BMS_Log_XmlTrackerCleared: XML tracking data cleared (DefSourceMap: {0}, XmlBuckets: {1}, PatchSourceMap: {2})
LanguageData.BMS_Log_AILoadingExtractFailed: Failed to extract short description for {0}: {1}
LanguageData.BMS_Log_AILoadingException: LLM request threw an underlying exception:\n{0}
